ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "address" INTEGER /* Address of the register */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the register (e.g., int32, float) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the register (e.g., kWh, kVARh) */,
  "writable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the register is writable */,
  "transform" TEXT /* Transformation applied to the register data (e.g., mod10k) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the register */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the register can hold */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the register can hold */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Value at which an alert should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_transform FOREIGN KEY ("transform") REFERENCES data_transformations ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., energy meter, sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of past maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES device_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_registers" (
  "device_register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-register association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "last_read" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last read from the register */,
  "last_value" REAL /* Last recorded value of the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_registers_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_registers_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the register */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., physical meter, sensor) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the data log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high consumption, low voltage) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., plant manager, engineer, maintenance staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula used for the transformation */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of how the transformation is applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the unit (e.g., kWh, kVARh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "last_changed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who last changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_alerts" (
  "device_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
